title: Travelers Reborn
description: A small mod for Travelers Reborn making many compats
body:
A small yet ever growing project featuring new mobs, foods, and more for our Travelers Reborn Modpack.

Whats in?
- Modular API with new materials for compat
- Legendary Survival Overhaul Thirst Compat with Pams Harvest Craft mods
- New Skills for puffish Skills
- Replacement of recipes for foods to add more compat
